zh.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen是Graf Ernst von Gleichen I和n.n.的兒子，出生。他於大約1170年與Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1192年9月7日。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen是Graf Ernst von Gleichen I和n.n.的儿子，出生。他于大约1170年与Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1192年9月7日。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleichen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for an iron worker who flattened out the metal into sheets, from an agent derivative of Middle High German gelīchen ‘to smooth or even out’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the inflected form of German gleich ‘same’, one of names from vocabulary words that were selected at random by government officials when surnames were made compulsory.

nameMeanings.name: Erwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Irwin
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Irwyn, Erwyn, or Everwyn, from Old English eofor ‘boar’ + wine ‘friend’. There has also been some confusion with Irving .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen was born as the son of Graf Ernst von Gleichen I and n.n.. He married Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen about 1170. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 September 1192.

fr.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen est né, fils de Graf Ernst von Gleichen I et n.n.. Il a épousé Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1192.

de.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen wurde, als Sohn von Graf Ernst von Gleichen I und n.n. geboren. Er hat um 1170 Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. September 1192.

it.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen è nato il come figlio di Graf Ernst von Gleichen I e n.n.. Lui sposato Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen circa 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 settembre 1192.

ja.Gleichen, Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Tysk: ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス グoッティンジェングレイチェン

ja.lifeSummary: Erwin II von GleichenはGraf Ernst von Gleichen Iとn.n.の息子として生まれた。約1170年にCountess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1192年9月7日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen(은)는 Graf Ernst von Gleichen I(와)과 n.n.의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1170년 Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1192년 9월 7일 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen nasceu filho de Graf Ernst von Gleichen I e n.n.. Ele casou-se com Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen aproximadamente 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1192.

ru.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen родился. Его родителей звали Graf Ernst von Gleichen I и n.n. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen около 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 сентября 1192 г.

es.lifeSummary: Erwin II von Gleichen nació como hijo de Graf Ernst von Gleichen I y n.n.. Se casó con Countess Adelheid von Orlamünde of Gleichen aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1192.
